description: Community workshop index for GitHub Pages. Add entries here through pull requests.

mods.name: Workshop Welcome
mods.description: Example download-only mod used to test the GitHub Pages Workshop flow.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Better Dex
mods.description: Adds monotype matching for duplicate type filters and move filters for equipped or learned moves.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Better Move Sorting
mods.description: Adds sorting controls and move keywords to a Pokemon's learned move list.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Shiny Evolve
mods.description: Makes evolutions from shiny Pokemon unlock shiny evolved units.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Cosmoem Evolves
mods.description: Adds Cosmog Candy to the shop to evolve Cosmoem into Solgaleo during the day or Lunala during the night.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Pokerus filter
mods.description: Adding a filter in the pokedex to find the pokemons that carry the virus faster.
mods.author: LPF

mods.name: Edit Team and Fight Again
mods.description: Adds an end-of-battle button that opens team editing before rematching the same battle.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: No More Magikarp
mods.description: Fixes Mega-Dimension rewards so White Kyurem and M-Rayquaza reward their actual Pokemon instead of Magikarp.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Bulk Candy Use
mods.description: Adds bulk-use choices for Rare Candy when selecting a Pokemon.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Better Genetics
mods.description: Adds Energy Root quick-use controls and an optional 5-second Quick Genetics mode.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Backup Mod
mods.description: Automatically sends clean Discord save backups every 10 minutes. Check the Backup Mod guide entry before using.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Shiny Family
mods.description: Makes every unlocked Pokemon in an evolution family shiny once any unlocked member of that family is shiny.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Fatigue Remover
mods.description: Removes Battle Fatigue HP loss completely while enabled.
mods.author: UltraPokechill

mods.name: Multi Heart Scale
mods.description: Lets Heart Scale remember multiple moves at once, spending one Heart Scale per selected move.
mods.author: UltraPokechill
